ab: Bilaq ku siida o mniq Bsuring ka sapah nami. Babaw matas do musa thjil Teypaq da. Ida mniq meudus alang paru.
ch: 小時候我們家住在秀林，上學以後，就搬到了台北，一直在都市裡生活。
en: When we were young, our family lived in Bsuring. After I started school, we moved to Taipei and have been living in the city ever since.

ab: Babaw matas paru ptasan do smluhay ku 1 iyax tuki quri ptasan knkla kndsan seejiq tnpusu, mkkla ku lala kngklgan seejiq tnpusu Taiwan knsyangan ka knkla kndsan.
ch: 上了大學以後，我修了一堂關於原住民文化的課程，瞭解到臺灣原住民族有各式各樣豐富的文化。
en: After I went to college, I took a course on aboriginal culture and learned that the aboriginal people in Taiwan have various and rich cultures.

ab: Kiya ni rbagan hngkawas sayang do musa alang qmita smiling rudan ka qbsuran mu snaw ni yaku. Kmklaun nami nanak ka knklgan seejiq knkla kndsan ta.
ch: 因此，今年暑假時，我和哥哥回到部落訪問老人家，想要瞭解自己族群的文化。
en: So this summer, my brother and I went back to our tribe to visit the elderly, hoping to understand the culture of our own ethnic group.

ab: Wada maspat kmxalan hngkwasan na ka rudan da, kiya ni mdka saw mgska knrudan seejiq qtaan.
ch: 老人家已經八十歲了，但是看起來還像中年人。
en: The old man is already eighty years old, but he still looks like a middle-aged man.

ab: Smiling ku hyaan mnmanu kari ka klaun na, mkla bi rmngaw kari Truku ka hiya. mkla kari Tayal, kari Ngayngay ni kari Nihung.
ch: 我問他會哪些語言，他的太魯閣族語說得很流利，也會說泰雅語、客家話和日本話。
en: I asked him which languages he knew, and he was fluent in Truku, as well as Atayal, Hakka and Japanese.

ab: Smniling ku hyaan do hana ku mkla, kla sa paah laqi do smluhay kari Nihung da. Kuyuh na o seejiq Tayal. Kiya ni qnpahan na o mgkla lala bi seejiq Ngangay, kika saw nii mkla rmngaw lala knlgan kari.
ch: 我問他才知道，原來他小時候就學日本話，太太是泰雅族人，而他工作上認識許多客家人，所以他會說這麼多語言。
en: I asked him to find out that he learned Japanese when he was a child, his wife is an Atayal, and he knows many Hakkas at work, so he can speak so many languages.

ab: Empprngaw nami ssida do lala bi rnngaw na quri knkla knxalan maduk ka rudan.
ch: 我們訪談的時候，老人家談論了許多關於狩獵的傳統知識。
en: During our interview, the old man talked about a lot of traditional knowledge about hunting.

ab: Ana nami ini qhdui mkla embahang, kiya ni spowda nami nngalan nami sasaw qnawal baga, mtduwa tgluus embahang duri.
ch: 雖然我們沒有辦法完全聽懂，但是我們有用手機錄影，可以再仔細聆聽。
en: Although we could’t fully understand it, we could record it on our cell phones and listen to it more.

ab: Bilaq ku siida ini ku kla knkla kndsan seejiq ta nanak, ita nanak ka saw seejiq tnpusu o niqan cicih saw smsiqa kida.
ch: 小時候我不瞭解自己族群的文化，對於自己是原住民有點不好意思。
en: When I was young, I didn’t understand the culture of my ethnic group, and I was a little embarrassed that I was an aborigine.

ab: Rinah lala klaun ta do, rina tgkla ita nanak ka seejiq Truku o maa kingal bi nanak ni balay bi tdhuun uri.
ch: 瞭解愈多以後，愈覺得自己身為太魯閣族人，是很獨特的，也很值得驕傲。
en: The more I know, the more I feel that being a Truku is unique and something to be proud of.
